[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0101011101 6
1 0001100000 2
2 0010000000 1
3 0111001000 4
4 0101011101 6
5 0001100000 2
6 0000000000 a
7 0010000010 2

12 21 0111001001 5
23 32 0001000000 1

56 65 0101101110 6
67 76 0001101000 3
70 07 0000000000 a match 6

35 53 0001100000 2 match 1 5

57 75 0001101000 3

71 17 0001001000 2

25 52 0111001100 5
36 63 0001100000 2 match 1 5
47 74 0001001000 2
50 05 0010000010 2 match 7
61 16 0101001001 4
